sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 53 2026-05-28: Sandee directly names Ayia Triada Beach on Othonoi in the Ionian Islands, supporting identity/location traceability only. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Ionian medium-confidence cleanup 2026-06-05 DK: neutralized unsupported asphalt-road, cafe/taverna, parking and shallow-water claims for Ayia Triada. The existing Sandee page supports identity/location and large white-stone beach character, but its broader nearby-service copy is not enough for high-confidence access or amenities. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 45: Ferryhopper Othonoi guide supports Molos beach identity/location on Othonoi. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Ferryhopper supports Molos on Othonoi as the closest/easiest beach by the port, with soft sand and shallow-water context. Nearby settlement-service wording stays generic; no live condition claim was added.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: promoted to high for static beach facts only after reviewing direct island/beach source coverage for recorded access, terrain, depth, shade and service context. Source scenic/calm/clear wording was not imported into scoring, windProfile, photos, water-quality, or live condition claims.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Batch 3B source check 2026-05-25: AllOverGreece describes Aspri Ammos Othonoi as white fine sand, isolated, boat-only, not organised, and without family/easy-access suitability.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: Othonoi Aspri Ammos promoted to high for static beach facts only. Existing direct AllOverGreece source notes support identity/location plus recorded boat-only access, sandy terrain and no organized services. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.
